description: Style Note Tonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out! Product Details Crafted in fine fabric this trendy top from Tonga has a round neck, cap sleeves and graphic print all over the top Material and Care 50% cotton and 50% polyester Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Flat dry Low iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
